texts.full_text: her husband and therapy sessions that make her talk about seeing the reds and whites of her friends' insides after a mortar attack in 2004. As with other women in her position, hiding seems to make sense. Post-traumatic stress disorder distorts personalities: some veterans who have it fight in their sleep; others feel paranoid around children. And as women return to a society unfamiliar with their wartime roles, they often choose isolation over embarrassment. Many spend months or years as virtual shut-ins, missing the camaraderie of Iraq or Afghanistan, while racked with guilt over who they have become. "After all, I'm a soldier, I'm an NCO, I'm a problem solver," said Mrs. Pacquette, 5years after her tour in Iraq. "What's it going to look like if I'm still messed up? If I'm still not getting things straight in my head?" The struggle to adjust to civilian life is compounded by the fact that women are often expected to be and caring, roles that can be difficult to reconcile with the harsh realities of war. As a result, female veterans with PTSD feel like they're losing themselves, and that their experiences are not being understood or validated by those around them. texts.full_text: Sine Terra Firma released both first albumsof Yann Tiersen,La Valse des monstres (1995) and Rue des Cascades (1996) and began to be successful. The last compilation of the label, calledIci, d'ailleurs... (1996),gave its name to the indie record label. Ici, d'ailleurs... keeps an eclectic artistic direction, withno particularly musical genre. The release of the third YannTiersen album,Le Phare (1998) allowedthe label to expand internationally by proposing at once French and foreign artisits. Yann Lemaire(aka Mad Professor),The Black Dog Triofeat John Taylor as well known artistsjoined Sine Terra Firma/Ici d'ailleurs.... Other names followed, such Mika Vainio & Jim O'Rourke orthegroup Hrvatski. In 1998 ICID'AILLEURS became a fully-fledged independent record label. In France and abroad (Germany/Switzerland/England/Russia/Europe) distribution wasmade with KPM/Bongenius, Universal Music Distribution &EFA as well major retailers suchHMV or Border's. The international network of press offices helped promotethe catalogue internationally: London/LA/NY/Toronto/Helsinki/Moscow/Istanbul. In 1984 Ici d'ailleurs became one among a few other labelsto receive subsidies from SACEM for their artistic achievement The label has become well known in France, as it is very oftenheard or seenon TV and radio. Artists alsoappearfrequently at major festivals like Cannes Music Film Festival.Ici D'Ailleur's first releases were by french artists but overthe years they have startedworking with more international musicians: The Black Dog Triofeat John Taylor , MikaVainio & JimO'Rourke, Hrvatski (USA), Yann Lemaireaka Mad Professor In April 2014 ICI D'AILLEURS signeda publishing deal for the frenchspeaking areas in Europe with BMG Rights Management . The station was primarily used for the transportation of goods and passengers to and from the Eastwood and Langley Mill areas, playing a vital role in the local economy and community life. Eastwood and Langley Mill railway station was a typical station of the era, featuring a mix of architectural styles from the Victorian and Edwardian periods. It had a station building, a ticket office, a waiting room, and a signal box. The station was also equipped wiTh a footbridge and a platform for the train tracks, which allowed for the safe and efficient transfer of passengers and cargo. Despite its importance, the station was closed in 1967, as part of the British Railways' rationalization of the rail network. The station was then demolished, and the tracks were lifted. texts.full_text: 2018 Daily Reading: 10 November (from www.christianaid.org.uk) A sense of the human Jesus. Something to read ‘ Seeing in the distance a fig tree in leaf, he went to see whether perhaps he would find anything on it. When he came to it, he found nothing but leaves, for it was not the season for figs. He said to it, “May no one ever eat fruit from you again.” ’ Mark 11:13-14, from full reading Mark 11: 12-14, 20-24 Something to think about In this passage we get a real sense of the human Jesus. Perhaps after a journey you have shared the frustration of trying to find somewhere to eat only to discover that everywhere is closed. Tired and hungry is not a good combination, but it does seem a rather extreme reaction from Jesus given 1) he was going in search figs which are unlikely ever be ripe at this time anyway; 2 )he wasn’t looking for food – or even fruit - as the disciples were to eat that evening Something else? Why do you think did Mark record these words and action of Christ ? What message does it have when we read them today.? texts.full_text: neuroimaging findings for potential risk factors such as hypertension, diabetes mellitus, hypercholesterolemia, and atrial fibrillation. The results revealed a significant prevalence of CMB in our cohort, which was comparable to that observed in the Asian population but lower than reported in some other non-Asian studies. We identified several risk factors for developing CMB among MMD/MMS patients, including older age, male gender, and smoking history. Interestingly, we found no apparent differences in CMB prevalence based on ethnicity or geographic region within our sample of non-Asian populations. Our findings suggest that cerebral microbleeds are not only common but also a potential risk factor for vascular events in MMD/MMS patients from the American population, irrespective of their ethnic background. These results underscore the need for close monitoring and management of cerebrovascular risks among these patients to prevent potentially devastating hemorrhagic strokes. Further prospective studies should be conducted to validate our findings

texts.full_text: by Reps. Becker, Lynch, Stebelton, et al., HB269 requires voters to show photO identification for in-person voting. The bill revises Ohio law concerning the identification an elector must provide in order to cast absent voter’s ballots, to vote in person at a polling place, or to cast a provisional ballot. Under this legislation, acceptable forms of identification include: 1. An unexpired driver's license or state identification card issued by Ohio or any other state government; 2. A United States passport or passport card; 3. A military identification card; 4. Any other photo identification that includes the elector’s name and address, issued by the U.S. government or the State of Ohio; 5. A concealed handgun license that displays the licensee's photograph and confirms the licensee's identity. The bill also specifies that individuals without valid photo identification may vote provisionally if they present a utility bill, bank statement, government check, paycheck, or other government document that shows their name and current address. The voter must then return within seven days with acceptable photo ID for the provisional ballot to be counted. The legislation aims to enhance election security by ensuring that voters are who they claim to be when casting a vote in person at a polling place or requesting an absentee ballot. texts.full_text: than stronger rock, leaving an indentation in coastlines and creating bays. Headlands refer specifically to narrow protrusions of land that extend into bodies of water such as oceans or seas from the shoreline; these natural features often have a rugged appearance due their formation through prolonged erosion. Headlands can be seen along many coastal areas around the world, serving both practical functions like guiding ships and providing scenic vistas for visitors. The relationship between bays and headlands is one of interdependence: as mentioned earlier they are typically found on same coastlines but in different positions relative to each other; a bay usually forms at an indentation or recess within this landscape. Headlands can be thought off like the "spine" supporting these coastal depressions, with bays serving almost functionally equivalent roles such as harbors for ships. Bands of soft and hard rocks are fundamental in shaping coastlines: where softer rock wears away more rapidly than its harder counterparts it leaves behind an indentation – this is a bay. On the other hand headlands form from areas with less erosion due to stronger, tougher types of stone that resist wear over time. Bays provide important ecological habitats for marine life and are often critical nesting sites or breeding grounds; they also play vital roles in coastal defense by absorbing wave energy which helps protect against storm surges. Headlands on the other hand can be significant landmarks aiding navigation, as well as natural barriers that help prevent coastline erosion. In summary: Bays represent areas of softer rock eroded into landmasses creating water-filled depressions; headlands are formed from harder and more durable stone which resists weathering leading to elevated coastal features. texts.full_text: Hybrid repair of a Kommerell's diverticulum aneurysm. Aneurysms of the right aortic arch with an aberrant left subclavian artery are rare. We report the case of a 77-year-old woman with a Kommerell's diverticulum aneurysm, who underwent a successful hybrid repair, combining open surgical and endovascular techniques to exclude the aneurysmal sac while preserving blood flow through the aberrant left subclavian artery. The patient had no postoperative complications and was discharged home on day five with significant improvement in her symptoms. This case highlights the feasibility of hybrid repair for complex aortic arch pathology, offering a minimally invasive alternative to traditional open surgical approa

We urge all parties involved to engage in peaceful negotiations towards finding a lasting solution to this crisis, ensuring stability and security for the affected communities." Syria Question: "What is the Secretary-General's stance on the ongoing conflict in Syria?" Spokesman: "The United Nations continues to condemn all acts of violence against civilians in Syria and calls upon all parties involved to cease hostilities immediately, particularly around densely populated areas. The UN remains committed to supporting a political solution that respects the sovereignty and territorial integrity of Syria while addressing the legitimate aspirations of its people for peace, security, and democratic governance." Climate Change Question: "How does the Secretary-General view climate change as an urgent global issue?" Spokesman: "Climate change is a top priority for the United Nations, with the Secretary-General emphasizing that it poses an existential threat to our planet and future generations. Similarly, in today’s financial markets, diversification is a cornerstone strategy for managing risk and protecting long-term wealth. In investing, diversification means spreading capital across different asset classes (stocks, bonds, real estate), sectors (technology, healthcare, energy), and geographic regions (domestic, international). The goal is to reduce the impact of any single underperforming investment on the overall portfolio. For example, if one sector experiences a downturn, others may remain stable or even grow, helping to balance losses and maintain steady progress toward financial goals. Diversification isn’t just about spreading risk—it’s also about capturing opportunities. By including a mix of assets with varying levels of risk and return potential, investors can tailor their portfolios to align with their time horizons, risk tolerance, and objectives. Over time, this strategy can help smooth out market volatility and avoid overexposure to any one investment or market condition. However, diversification does not guarantee profits or protect against all losses. It requires periodic rebalancing to maintain the desired asset allocation as markets fluctuate. Additionally, the effectiveness of diversification depends on how well the selected investments correlate—diverse assets that move independently of one another are most valuable during market stress. As with the ancient merchants, the key to successful diversification lies in thoughtful planning. A well-structured, diversified portfolio can act as a buffer against market uncertainty, helping investors stay focused on their long-term vision rather than short-term turbulence. The invention further concerns a humidifying apparatus for humidifying a respiratory gas as well as a respiratory gas tube or hose and a connecting apparatus therefor. 2. Description of Related Art Apparatuses for supplying a respiratory gas under an increased pressure are known in the art. For example, U.S. Patent No. 6,024,748 discloses a respiratory gas supply apparatus that includes a gas supply unit, a humidifier, and a pressure regulator. The gas supply unit delivers respiratory gas to the humidifier, which humidifies the gas. The pressure regulator then regulates the pressure of the humidified gas before it is supplied to a patient. However, known apparatuses have several disadvantages. One disadvantage is that the humidifier is typically located downstream of the pressure regulator. This arrangement can lead to condensation of water vapor in the humidified gas, which can cause blockages in the apparatus and reduce the efficiency of the humidifier. texts.full_text: l tumour treatedsurgically at the University Veterinary Centre, Sydney. To evaluatethe success of surgical treatment of thesetumours and identifyvariables predictive oflocalrecurrenceandsurvival.Toestablish whether conclusions drawn from previousinternational studies are applicable to theUniversityVeterinaryCentre, Sydney, dog population and vice versa. Clinicalpresentationand results ofsurgicalexcision of 54 soft tissuesarcomas and70 mast cell tumours affectingthe trunk and limbs of dogs atthe University VeterinaryCentre, Sydney, between 1989 and2001 were reviewed retrospectively. Cross-bred dogs and Rhodesian ridgebacks wereat significantlygreater risk of developing softtissuesarcomas,and Boxers, AustralianCattleDogs andStaffordshire Bull Terriers were at significantly greater risk of developingmast cell tumours than other breeds. Fine needleaspiration biopsy yielded a correct diagnosis in 62.5% of soft tissue sarcomas and 96% of mast celltumours. The5-year recurrence-free and overallsurvival rates were60%and 73% for soft tissuesarcomas and 91%and 98% for mast celltumours. The only variable predictive of recurrenceof soft tissue sarcomas was the presence of a positive surgical margin. The presence of a positive surgical margin and the tumour size werepredictive of recurrenceof mast cell tumours. The presence of apositive surgical margin was the onlyvariable predictive of reduced survival in soft tissue sarcomas. The presence of a positive surgicalmargin and the tumour size werepredictiveof reducedsurvival in mast cell tumours. The findings of the present study are consistent with the findings of previous international studies. Theresults of thepresentstudy are applicableto the dogpopulation

texts.full_text: the Irizarrys moved in with the church as their landlord. Gil Kamps says that in two years, when the Irizarrys are in better shape financially, Trinity will sell them the house for what the church paid for it. For the first time in their lives Sam and Juliet will be homeowners. They are already “at home” at Trinity. Sam is a member of two church committees: one addresses community needs, the other maintains the church facilities. But he prays that someday he’ll be nominated as a deacon. “I never get tired of telling people, ‘If your life is tough, give it to the Lord.’ I think helping people is a calling.” Even if Sam isn’t elected deacon, he’s keen to help local prison inmates. “Without the Lord I wouldn’t be where I am now. It’s not easy, but it’s the right road. The Lord has blessed us with forgiveness, and I’m forgiven. I have nothing to hide.” Sam laughs. “I’ve drunk with the worst, now I’m walkin’ with the Best!” About the Author Marian Van Til was a founding member of Jubilee Fellowship CRC, St. Catharines, Ontario. She and her husband live in Youngstown, N.Y., where Marian works as a writer, editor, and church musician. Her first book, George Frideric Handel: A Music Lover’s Guide, was released in June. To delve deeper into this: ### Mathematical Context Consider a sequence of integers \( 2 = p_1 < p_2 < p_3 < \cdots < p_n = r \), you're interested in when the sum \( S_{n-1} = p_1 + p_2 + \cdots + p_{n-1} \) satisfies: \[ S_{n-1} \equiv 0 \pmod{b}. \] ### Observed results From your exploration: - Up to the 40,000th prime (479909), only two integers exhibit this property: \( 5, 71, \) and \( 369119 \). - extending this search up to the 5,761,455th prime (\(10^8\)), sivaram Ambikasaran believes these are not the only known cases. ### Heuristic Insight The heuristic you mentioned gives a mathematical approach: - If we say that \( S_n \) (the sum of all integers greater than \( p_n \)) is uniformly distributed modulo \( p_n \), then the likelihood that \( S_{n-1} \equiv 0 \pmod{p_n} \) will be approximately \( \frac{1}{p_n} \). - This assumes that as \( n \) increases, finding such integers gets progressively rarer. ### Implications The rarity of these primes can be linked to the nature of prime distributions and modular arithmetic. The fact that only a few examples are known up to very small limits suggests that this is not just a event but even an especially rare one in the realm of number theory. ###

texts.full_text: Chi Minh City and Hanoi was the largest andlargest beer festival outside Germany. The event drew thousands of people from all over Vietnam to enjoy traditional German food such as sausages (wurst) and pretzels. The first Oktoberfest took place on October 16, 1810 in Munich when Bavarian Duke Maximilian I married his wife Maria Theresia at the age of fifteen. The festival was originally a celebration for this royal marriage but has since grown to become an annual event that attracts millions from around the world. The Oktoberfest is held every year between late September and early October in Munich, Germany's capital city where it began over 200 years ago with just one beer tent serving only Bavarian beers. Now there are more than twenty tents at this festival which serve all types of German foods including roast chicken (Hänfling), roasted pork knuckle or "Schweinshaxe" and traditional sausages such as Weisse Wurst, Bratwürtel und Sauerkraut. Today's Oktoberfest has become a major tourist attraction for Germany with millions attending every year from all over the world. It is also an important part of German culture where people celebrate their heritage through music (Oompah bands), traditional costumes and food that are enjoyed by locals as well tourists alike during this time each autumn. texts.full_text: f S100 and S100-like proteins [@pone.0096202-Gifford1]. In either structural group, a pair of EF-hand motifs or pseudo EF-hand motifs forms a structural domain and is the minimum requirement for Ca^2+^-dependent activation. In general, one of the EF-hand motifs has a higher Ca^2+^-binding affinity than the other. The canonical Ca^2+^-binding loop is characterized by a sequence of 12 amino acid residues. In an EF-hand loop the calcium ion is coordinated in a pentagonal bipyramidal configuration. The six residues involved in the binding are in positions 1, 3, 5, 7, 9 and 12; these residues are denoted by X, Y, Z, -Y, -X and -Z. In general, affinity constants of EF-hand domains for Ca^2+^ vary from micromolar to millimolar, reflecting the diversity of functions carried out by these proteins in a range of Ca^2+^ concentrations. There is an increase in stability and change in conformation upon binding Ca^2+^. Several residues found in an EF-hand loop are highly conserved and contribute to the stabilization and proper folding of the binding site. Factors such as biological environment as well as the binding sequence have been shown to contribute to the calcium-binding affinity of these proteins [@pone.0096202-Gifford1]--[@pone.0096202-Linse2]. A number of algorithms have been developed to computationally identify EF hand-containing CaBPs and Ca^2+^-binding regions, including statistical, machine learning and pattern search approaches [@pone.0096202-Lin1]--[@pone.0096202-Franke1]. texts.full_text: specify the network to build for (e.g., `--network mainnet`) `--optimize` | enable contract optimization ## deploy ``` $ embark deploy ``` Deploys the smart contracts to the specified blockchain network. This command uses the build artifacts generated by the `build` command. Option | Description --- | --- `--network` | specify the network to deploy to (e.g., `--network mainnet`) `--gas` | set the gas limit for the deployment transaction `--gas-price` | set the gas price for the deployment transaction ## start ``` $ embark start ``` Starts the Embark development server. This command launches a local blockchain network (like Ganache) and a frontend server. Option | Description --- | --- `--port` | specify the port number for the frontend server (default: 8080) `--network` | specify the Network to start (e.g., `--network mainnet`) ## test ``` $ embark test ``` Runs the test suite for your DApp. This command executes the tests defined in your project's `test` directory. Option | Description --- | --- `--network` | specify the network to test against (e.g., `--network mainnet`) `--coverage` | generate test coverage reports ## lint ``` $ embark lint ``` Lints the smart contracts in your project. This command checks for common issues and coding standards in your Solidity code. Option | Description --- | --- `--fix` | automatically fix linting issues where possible ## clean ``` $ embark clean ``` Cleans the project by removing the build artifacts and other temporary files. This command is useful for freeing up disk space and ensuring a clean build. Option | Description --- | --- `--force` | force the clean even if the project is not empty ## logs ``` $ embark logs ``` Displays the logs for the Embark development server and the local blockchain network. This command is helpful for debugging and monitoring your DApp. Option | Description --- | --- `--follow` | continuously update the logs ## version `
